user_parameters_schema.description: Configure your Telegram endpoint for this enrollment

chat_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the Telegram chat or channel ID
chat_id_secret.title: Chat ID Secret Name

webhook_base_url_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the base URL of your Telegram server (e.g. https://hooks.slack.com)
webhook_base_url_secret.title: Webhook Base URL Secret Name

webhook_path_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the webhook path (e.g. /bot{token}/sendMessage)
webhook_path_secret.title: Webhook Path Secret Name

user_parameters_schema.title: Telegram Transformer Configuration

chat_id_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds your Telegram chat or channel ID

webhook_base_url_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds the base URL (scheme + host) of your Telegram webhook

webhook_path_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds the webhook path
